summary: A bounded real Hermes public-safety-gate worker used the local terminal tool in a real workspace, completed through kanban_complete, and produced a structured public-safe result without local model or tool stubs.
scope: real Hermes runtime, public-safety-gate worker, local terminal tool authorization, read-only workspace checks
limits: This proof satisfies real_tool_auth for the current production preflight only for the local Hermes terminal tool path used by the bounded worker smoke.
It does not prove Discord, external SaaS, cloud, browser, GitHub mutation, scanner credential or every future worker-tool integration.
Raw runtime output, local paths, runtime ids, session files and provider logs are intentionally not stored in the public repository.
